references.passiveText: I've been thinking about whether the {enemy_type} we fought were truly as wicked as everyone says.
references.triggerDialogue: A traveler passed through {location} last month and told me about a place {location_hint} where settlers and {enemy_type} actually trade with each other. Peacefully. {target_npc} didn't believe it, but I keep wondering: if they can do it there, why not here? Maybe someone should go and see how it works.
